case_title: KOLKEY, ZORA VS O`TOOLE, MATHEW C/O ZARE HAIGHT STREET.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-06-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-25-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOLKEY, ZORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O`TOOLE, MATHEW C/O ZARE HAIGHT STREET. $453.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $518.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT O`TOOLE, MATHEW C/O ZARE HAIGHT STREET.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $545.89 AS TO DEFENDANT O`TOOLE, MATHEW C/O ZARE HAIGHT STREET.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOLKEY, ZORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O`TOOLE, MATHEW C/O ZARE HAIGHT STREET. $903.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $968.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLTF'S CONT.REQUEST AND ADDRESS CORRECTION FILED; INFO RE: REQUIREMENTS & FEES SENT TO NEW ADDRESS;
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-26-1999, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-21-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-06-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT COURT DATE BE ADVANCED TO MAR.25,1999 AT 3:30 PM. SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE. $10.00 FEE PAID.
